title: Blueprint Registry Console
concept: A Blueprint-first command console that uses an admin-style registry table for saved, local, temporary, imported, exported, and deleted Playground objects while keeping selected Blueprint detail and a live WordPress preview visible.
focus: Blueprint search, selected detail, URL runner, JSON editor, validation, run, copy, and download commands
Admin table object model for Playground rows and transfer states
Local-directory save lifecycle with permission, progress, folder identity, and reload consequence
Protected live WordPress shell with path, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, storage badge, and Site Manager access
Stateful file, database, replacement, delete, import, and export outcomes
flows: Finish Save to a local directory end to end with folder picker, cancel path, permission grant, file-copy progress, selected folder identity, local badge, active row mutation, transfer history, and reconnect-after-refresh consequence.

Run a selected Blueprint replacement end to end with gallery search, categories, selected detail, Blueprint URL, JSON editor, validation, replace-current warning, confirmation, progress, preview mutation, database size change, imported row state, and transfer log.
Use the Site Manager Files tab to select wp-config.php, mark it dirty, save the file with progress, clear the dirty state, update logs, and record a transfer result.
Download database.sqlite from the SQLite-backed database with path, size, progress, success state, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and transfer history.
Manage saved and unsaved rows with open, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, deleted final state, and active shell continuity.

Create or import through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import with route-specific inputs and replacement consequences.
Run portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle copy/download while the live preview remains visible.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored consequence
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Selected Blueprint detail with URL, JSON editor, validation, copy, download, run, warning, progress, and result state
Save in this browser with browser slug and saved row mutation
Save to a local directory with folder picker, cancellation, permission grant, progress, folder identity, local badge, and reconnect consequence
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, imported, exported, and deleted table row states
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancellation, and deleted final state
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local/imported state, Save, and reset/reload consequences
Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save progress, and result state
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive Apply Settings & Reset Playground and stored Save & Reload behavior
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice and mutation records
Export to GitHub
Download as .zip
Database download
Blueprint bundle portability actions
Transfer history for saves, imports, exports, file edits, database downloads, deletes, path navigation, and Blueprint runs
